name: beskind-vscode
description: VS Code support for Beskid (.bd, .proj) via the Beskid LSP

beskid.lsp.server.command.description: LSP launch command used in dev mode (requires `beskid.lsp.server.devMode=true`).

beskid.lsp.server.args.description: LSP launch args used in dev mode (requires `beskid.lsp.server.devMode=true`).

beskid.lsp.server.preferBundled.description: Use bundled platform server binary under extension `server/<platform>-<arch>/`.

beskid.lsp.server.devMode.description: Launch LSP from source (requires repo cloned locally). When false, extension expects bundled binary or explicit `server.path`.

beskid.lsp.server.path.description: Absolute path to a Beskid LSP binary. Overrides bundled and fallback command settings.

beskid.lsp.server.cwd.description: Optional working directory for the language server process. Empty means current workspace root.

beskid.lsp.server.debugArgs.description: Arguments used when VS Code launches the extension in debug mode (dev mode).
